title:
Visual arts market trends, audience insights, and photographer income in New Zealand
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Visual arts market trends, audience insights, and photographer income in New Zealand
I’m seeking data to support a business plan for a new fine art photography venture (Rainbird Photography). I’m specifically looking for:

Insights into buying behaviour for photographic and visual art in NZ — including trends, price points, preferred sales channels (e.g. online, galleries, markets)

Audience segmentation data — who purchases art, how often, and what motivates them

Photographer/visual artist income levels, employment models, and common challenges to sustainability

Any reports, surveys, or findings related to the creative sector that may support business planning for emerging artists

I’ve read Creative NZ’s published snapshots and reports but would appreciate more detailed or updated data if available.
...creative business owners being unable to access detailed, NZ-specific data about audience demand, pricing expectations, and income benchmarks in the visual arts sector.
...helping new creative entrepreneurs make evidence-based decisions around market fit, pricing, and sustainability — essential for funding applications and long-term viability.

### Response from Arts Council of New Zealand Toi Aotearoa
Status Awaiting moderation

#### Likely Source Agency
Arts Council of New Zealand Toi Aotearoa
